title: Amazon ASIN COSMO + Rufus Audit
description: Evidence-driven audit of a single Amazon ASIN across COSMO semantic retrieval, Rufus Q&A, listing conversion and ad readiness. Pulls page/review/competitor data through whatever MCP data-source is configured, scores 7 dimensions, and produces the standard 11-section report plus concrete rewrites and an ad plan. Vendor-agnostic: discovers data tools via mcp_list_tools rather than hard-coding any provider.
